storyboard.content: I have a rapidly spreading, extremely painful rash with blisters all over my torso and back
The blisters are filled with clear fluid and some are starting to break open
I have a fever and feel generally unwell
This started 3 days ago and has been spreading rapidly
The pain is excruciating, around 8 out of 10, it is keeping me from sleeping and I cannot wear normal clothes because my skin is so sensitive
The rash seems to follow a line or pattern along my nerves rather than being scattered randomly
